question: How do I access Canvas?
final_answer:
To access Canvas, you can follow these steps:

You can log in to Canvas through the Help link in the bottom-left sidebar. Alternatively, use your JHED ID and password to access the platform. To enable two-factor authentication (DUO) for added security, go to `https://my.jhu.edu` > Account > Password and reset your password if you're locked out.

Sources: it_canvas_access.md
Sources: it_canvas_access.md, it_vpn_access.md
